title: Parkio Daily for April 28, 2026
teaser: Magic Kingdom's Wish Lounge reopens with fresh updates, plus Halloween party hints and construction walls go up around Big Thunder.

rides.name: Space Mountain
rides.note: Big Thunder still closed, drawing crowds elsewhere

bignews.title: Magic Kingdom's Wish Lounge Reopens with New Design
bignews.body: Walt Disney World rededicated the refreshed Wish Lounge at Magic Kingdom yesterday, a private space for Make-A-Wish families featuring new artwork inspired by Disney wish-granting stories. The lounge now offers updated amenities and a welcoming retreat during park visits.
bignews.parkioInsight: This lounge is not accessible to regular guests, but you may see heightened activity near the entrance during wish family visits.

bignews.title: Halloween Party Start Date Teased for 2026
bignews.body: Disney World hinted at the earliest-ever start date for Mickey's Not So Scary Halloween Party this year, with full details expected soon. The move suggests the seasonal event could begin before typical back-to-school schedules.
bignews.parkioInsight: If you're planning a summer trip, watch for party night closures that will affect regular park hours starting earlier than usual.

topstories.title: Tall Walls Now Block Big Thunder Mountain Views
topstories.body: Construction barriers around Big Thunder Mountain Railroad have gone up unusually high to block guest sightlines into the Villains Land and Cars expansion zones. The coaster remains closed through its 16-month refurbishment.
topstories.parkioInsight: These walls reduce photo ops in Frontierland, so plan your shots near Splash Mountain or the riverboat instead.

topstories.title: Disney Springs Launches Free Fashion Emergency Vending Machine
topstories.body: A complimentary vending machine at AMC DINE-in Disney Springs 24 is dispensing makeup, hair products, and accessories through May 3 as part of a promotional tie-in with The Devil Wears Prada 2. Items are free, no purchase required.
topstories.parkioInsight: Stop by the AMC lobby before 8 p.m. if you need a touch-up before dinner or photos around the lake.

topstories.title: Rock 'n' Roller Coaster Changes Spark Guest Reaction
topstories.body: Hollywood Studios guests are noticing significant updates to Rock 'n' Roller Coaster amid ongoing construction work in the area. The attraction remains operational while adjacent zones are under development.
topstories.parkioInsight: Expect construction noise and rerouted pathways near Sunset Boulevard throughout the day.

icymi.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Queue Protocols Now Semi-Permanent
icymi.body: Epcot has settled on a consistent approach to managing pre-show and queue shenanigans at Guardians of the Galaxy: Cosmic Rewind after months of testing stop-gap solutions. The new protocol appears to be the long-term fix.

spotlight.title: October 2027 Ticket Prices Now Available
spotlight.body: Disney World has released exact pricing for October 2027, revealing the cheapest days to visit next fall. Peak and off-peak pricing shows significant swings depending on week and park choice.
spotlight.parkioInsight: Book weekday visits in early October for the lowest gate prices and lighter Halloween party crowds.
